principle: Fake/anonymised bundles — test by shape, not identity.

reviewBeforeCursorBuilds: Check that no case requires real client material.
Check that every expected chase item asks for source material, not an outcome.
Check that must-not-say patterns do not accidentally block safety-warning lines.
Check that cases marked needs_solicitor_review or blocked_until_review are genuinely higher-risk.
Approve or edit case IDs/titles before pack generation.

cases.title: EncroChat handle attribution disputed with co-defendant bleed risk
cases.offenceWording: Conspiracy to supply Class A drugs
cases.mainIssue: The bundle refers to an encrypted handle but does not safely prove that the handle belongs to this defendant.
uncertainEvidence: whether the handle is personal, shared, or inferred from contact names
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Treat handle attribution as disputed and ask the court to record that full attribution and extraction material remains outstanding.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not treat a handle name or co-defendant reference as proof that the defendant sent the messages.
mustNotSay: co-defendant chat proves this defendant's role
polishOnlyWarnings: long encrypted-platform terminology may need simpler wording

cases.title: EncroChat extraction continuity and cropped-message trap
cases.offenceWording: Being concerned in the supply of Class A drugs
cases.mainIssue: Only cropped message images are served; the app must chase the full export and continuity before summarising meaning.
uncertainEvidence: whether screenshots are complete, edited, or selected
cases.expectedTodayIssue: The case is provisional because screenshots are served but the full extraction and metadata are not safely before the defence.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Screenshot-only evidence should be described as incomplete source material, not as the full communication record.
polishOnlyWarnings: may need grouping of screenshot and extraction chase items

cases.title: County lines cellsite and travel gaps
cases.offenceWording: Possession with intent to supply Class A drugs
cases.mainIssue: The papers allege travel and line use, but cellsite and phone attribution material is not served.
uncertainEvidence: whether the defendant controlled the line or was merely present
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Focus on role, attribution, and missing travel/telecoms material; keep exploitation possibility open if flagged.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not assume line control or dealing role without served attribution evidence.
polishOnlyWarnings: youth/vulnerability wording should be solicitor-safe

cases.title: County lines vulnerability and modern slavery marker
cases.offenceWording: Possession with intent to supply Class A drugs
cases.mainIssue: The bundle hints at exploitation and safeguarding but does not include the underlying referral or youth material.
uncertainEvidence: whether exploitation is evidenced or only mentioned
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Raise vulnerability/source-material pressure without asserting exploitation as proved.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Exploitation markers must be flagged as potential issues, not asserted as established facts.
blockingFailPatterns: modern slavery defence is made out
polishOnlyWarnings: client-facing wording should avoid labels without source backing

cases.title: Multi-defendant drug conspiracy per-defendant evidence map
cases.offenceWording: Conspiracy to supply Class A and Class B drugs
cases.mainIssue: The case papers mix defendants and roles; Omar's evidence must be separated from co-defendant allegations.
uncertainEvidence: which exhibits relate to Omar rather than co-defendants
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Ask for a per-defendant evidence map and avoid importing co-defendant role evidence against Omar.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Conspiracy role must remain provisional unless the source material specifically links this defendant.
polishOnlyWarnings: may need a defendant-specific source map later

cases.title: Drug conspiracy telecoms download missing but summary confident
cases.offenceWording: Conspiracy to supply Class A drugs
cases.mainIssue: The prosecution narrative relies on phone contact, but the actual call data and download are missing.
uncertainEvidence: whether contact frequency proves supply or ordinary association
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Treat telecoms as a disclosure and attribution issue, not a proved supply route.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: An analyst summary is not a substitute for the underlying phone and call-data material.
polishOnlyWarnings: could collapse call data and phone download into one telecoms chase family

cases.title: Multi-handed assault presence versus participation
cases.mainIssue: The bundle places the defendant at the scene, but participation is unclear and CCTV/BWV are referred only.
uncertainEvidence: whether Imran struck anyone or was merely present
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Frame the issue as participation and identification, with CCTV/BWV/medical evidence outstanding.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Presence at scene must not be summarised as participation in the assault.
polishOnlyWarnings: court line should be concise for first hearing

cases.title: Joint-enterprise violence with partial BWV
cases.mainIssue: The prosecution suggests group liability, but intent, participation, and full BWV are not safely established.
uncertainEvidence: whether Leah encouraged, assisted, withdrew, or was present only
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Keep joint-enterprise wording provisional and chase full media and medical evidence.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not overstate joint enterprise or intent from partial media.
polishOnlyWarnings: should preserve a safe alternative-charge angle without outcome guarantees

cases.title: Robbery CCTV stills only and poor-quality identification
cases.mainIssue: The served bundle contains still images but not the full CCTV; identification and continuity are unsafe.
uncertainEvidence: whether stills fairly represent the footage
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Challenge the source basis for identification and chase full CCTV before relying on stills.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: CCTV stills should not be described as the full footage or as confirming identity.
polishOnlyWarnings: CCTV chase may need separate master and continuity lines

cases.title: Robbery full time-window CCTV missing
cases.mainIssue: The papers rely on a short clip and do not serve the wider approach/departure footage.
uncertainEvidence: whether wider footage undermines identification or timing
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Seek full time-window media and avoid treating the selected clip as the complete incident record.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: A selected clip is not the whole timeline.
polishOnlyWarnings: avoid too many CCTV sub-items in Chase

cases.title: Historic sexual allegation with ABE referred only and delay issue
cases.mainIssue: ABE and first-account material are referred to but not safely served; delay/context must be handled carefully.
uncertainEvidence: whether delay/context material is served or only mentioned
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase ABE, first account, and third-party disclosure while keeping language neutral and non-victim-blaming.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not draw conclusions from delay or missing ABE; identify disclosure gaps neutrally.
polishOnlyWarnings: requires extra care in client-safe summary wording

cases.title: Historic sexual third-party records mentioned but absent
cases.mainIssue: The bundle mentions counselling, school, and medical records but only serves a police summary.
uncertainEvidence: whether third-party records have been obtained, reviewed, or withheld
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Raise third-party disclosure status as a source-material issue, not a factual conclusion.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not summarise third-party material as supportive or undermining until the source is served.
polishOnlyWarnings: legal sensitivity means sendability should remain review-first

cases.title: Phone download screenshots only with missing scope and metadata
cases.mainIssue: Screenshots are served but the full phone download, search scope, and metadata are missing.
uncertainEvidence: whether messages are complete, attributed, or taken out of context
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Focus on attribution, completeness, and missing download material.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Screenshots must not be treated as a full or authenticated message record.
polishOnlyWarnings: should avoid importing drugs/PWITS digital language

cases.title: Phone extraction continuity and search terms unclear
cases.mainIssue: The prosecution relies on digital extraction findings but the search scope and continuity are unclear.
uncertainEvidence: whether files were viewed, stored, cached, or attributable to the defendant
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Keep digital possession/knowledge provisional pending full extraction and attribution material.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not infer knowledge or possession from a summary table alone.
polishOnlyWarnings: specialist digital wording may need solicitor review

cases.title: ABH medical evidence referred only
cases.mainIssue: Injury is central but the actual medical evidence is referred to rather than served.
uncertainEvidence: whether injuries meet ABH threshold
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Identify ABH injury threshold and missing medical evidence as the live issue.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not state ABH level is proved without medical source material.
polishOnlyWarnings: charge-fit issue should avoid promising downgrade

cases.title: Section 18 versus section 20 intent trap
cases.offenceWording: Wounding with intent contrary to section 18
cases.mainIssue: The charge is s18, but intent evidence and medical detail are thin.
uncertainEvidence: whether specific intent can be supported on the served papers
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Raise charge-fit and missing intent/medical material without saying the prosecution case collapses.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Safe wording is charge-fit pressure, not a guaranteed reduction or win.
polishOnlyWarnings: must stay neutral after prior Clarke anchor issue

cases.title: Affray or violent disorder mixed participants
cases.mainIssue: The bundle mixes several participants and does not clearly identify this defendant's conduct.
uncertainEvidence: whether Sasha used or threatened violence
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Ask for media and a participant-specific timeline; do not import group conduct against Sasha.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Group disorder should not be summarised as this defendant's conduct unless sourced.
polishOnlyWarnings: may need compact court line due many participants

cases.title: Police contact public order with BWV and custody sequence gaps
cases.mainIssue: BWV and custody/PACE material are referred to but not safely served.
uncertainEvidence: sequence before arrest and defendant condition
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase BWV and custody/PACE records before accepting the police-contact narrative.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not treat BWV or custody safeguards as served if only referred to.
polishOnlyWarnings: should avoid duplicate BWV/custody chase labels

cases.title: Burglary forensic fingerprint referred only
cases.mainIssue: The prosecution summary mentions fingerprints but the forensic report and continuity are missing.
uncertainEvidence: whether any forensic evidence links Harvey to entry or only presence
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase forensic and CCTV source material; keep identification and entry provisional.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: A summary reference to fingerprints is not proof of burglary participation.
polishOnlyWarnings: forensic and CCTV may need separate chase families

cases.title: Handling stolen goods property continuity gap
cases.mainIssue: The bundle does not safely prove the property chain, theft status, or knowledge.
uncertainEvidence: whether item is the stolen property and whether Aimee knew
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Focus on property continuity and knowledge rather than assuming handling is proved.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Possession of property must not be overstated as knowledge of theft.
polishOnlyWarnings: summary should stay simple for magistrates' case

cases.title: Going equipped tool possession and lawful purpose trap
cases.mainIssue: Tools are found but context, lawful purpose, and officer body-worn video are incomplete.
uncertainEvidence: whether possession was for theft or innocent work/use
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase media and interview/context material; avoid assuming intent from possession alone.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Possession of tools alone should not be described as proof of going equipped.
polishOnlyWarnings: should not create robbery/PWITS bleed

cases.title: Drink driving intoxilyzer calibration missing
cases.mainIssue: The breath reading is in the summary but device/procedure records are missing.
uncertainEvidence: whether procedure and device checks are proved
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase procedure and device records before treating the reading as court-ready.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not say the alcohol reading is safely proved without procedure/source records.
polishOnlyWarnings: must keep motoring route, no fraud/drug bleed

cases.title: Drug driving lab and toxicology chain missing
cases.offenceWording: Driving with specified controlled drug over limit
cases.mainIssue: The case summary gives a drug level but toxicology continuity and lab certificate are not served.
uncertainEvidence: whether sample chain and result are admissibly proved
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase toxicology and sample continuity; keep result provisional.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: A summary drug level is not enough without lab and continuity records.
polishOnlyWarnings: technical items can be grouped under toxicology

cases.title: Failure to provide specimen procedure and BWV gaps
cases.offenceWording: Failing to provide a specimen for analysis
cases.mainIssue: Procedure, warning, reasonable excuse, and custody/BWV records are incomplete.
uncertainEvidence: whether refusal/warning/reasonable excuse is properly evidenced
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase procedure, warning, custody and medical material.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not state refusal is proved until procedure and warning source material is served.
polishOnlyWarnings: court line should avoid giving advice beyond source material

cases.title: No insurance driver identity and keeper trap
cases.offenceWording: Using a motor vehicle without insurance
cases.mainIssue: The bundle confuses keeper, policyholder, and driver identity.
uncertainEvidence: whether Meera was the driver and whether insurance status is correctly evidenced
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Separate keeper from driver and chase proof of use/insurance status.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Keeper details must not be treated as proof that the defendant drove uninsured.
polishOnlyWarnings: SJP wording should stay practical and brief

cases.title: Benefit fraud agency records missing
cases.offenceWording: Dishonestly failing to notify a change in circumstances
cases.mainIssue: The allegation depends on agency records and notification history not fully served.
uncertainEvidence: knowledge, dishonesty, and calculation basis
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase the benefit record and calculation basis before accepting dishonesty/overpayment.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not treat overpayment or dishonesty as proved from an agency summary alone.
polishOnlyWarnings: avoid importing bank account-control language unless bank records are served

cases.title: Money laundering bank/source schedule missing
cases.mainIssue: Banking conclusions are summarised but underlying statements and source-of-funds analysis are incomplete.
uncertainEvidence: whether funds are criminal property and whether defendant knew/suspected
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase source banking material and keep knowledge/criminal-property conclusions provisional.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not treat a bank schedule as proof of criminal property or knowledge.
polishOnlyWarnings: financial cases may need source-map table in H5 Evidence Trace

cases.title: False documents provenance expert mentioned only
cases.offenceWording: Possession of false identity document with improper intention
cases.mainIssue: The bundle mentions false-document analysis but does not serve the expert/source report.
uncertainEvidence: knowledge, improper intention, and document status
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase expert/provenance and interview material; avoid saying the document is false as proved.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: A document photo or officer belief is not enough to prove falsity/knowledge.
polishOnlyWarnings: avoid immigration advice wording unless clearly in scope

cases.title: Perverting justice route bleed from fraud-document paperwork
cases.offenceWording: Doing an act tending and intended to pervert the course of justice
cases.mainIssue: The papers include fraud-style documents, but the charge route is perverting justice and must not become fraud/account-control.
uncertainEvidence: intent to pervert justice versus administrative/document confusion
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Keep the route as perverting justice and chase intent/source chronology.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not import fraud/PWITS/robbery route language; keep safety warning separate from alleged facts.
polishOnlyWarnings: safety-warning lines saying do not import fraud should not false-fail

cases.title: Bladed article reasonable excuse and location continuity
cases.offenceWording: Possession of a bladed article in a public place
cases.mainIssue: The bundle lacks clear location, lawful authority/reasonable excuse context, and seizure continuity.
uncertainEvidence: public place, possession, and reasonable excuse
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase location, media, exhibit and interview context before treating the weapons allegation as proved.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not state unlawful possession without source-backed public-place and context evidence.
polishOnlyWarnings: should avoid overlong CPS chase from many exhibit items

cases.title: Imitation firearm forensic/source report missing
cases.offenceWording: Possession of an imitation firearm with intent to cause fear of violence
cases.mainIssue: The bundle refers to an imitation firearm and fear/intent, but forensic/source material is missing.
uncertainEvidence: whether item meets definition and whether intent is evidenced
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase item classification and incident media; keep intent provisional.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not say the item was an imitation firearm or intent is proved without source material.
polishOnlyWarnings: serious weapons language should be cautious

cases.title: Coercive control course of conduct and digital export missing
cases.mainIssue: The allegation depends on a course of conduct, but digital exhibits and chronology are incomplete.
uncertainEvidence: pattern, attribution, and context
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase the full digital export and chronology while avoiding conclusions about control/coercion.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Selected screenshots and narrative chronology should not be treated as proof of the whole course of conduct.
polishOnlyWarnings: sensitive domestic wording should be client-safe and neutral

cases.title: Malicious communications phone and account attribution
cases.mainIssue: The message exists, but account/device attribution and full thread context are not safely served.
uncertainEvidence: who sent the message and what context surrounds it
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Treat attribution and context as the main issue; chase account/platform records.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not attribute the message to Grace unless the source material supports it.
polishOnlyWarnings: could share digital attribution playbook with harassment

cases.title: Breach of restraining order service/order proof missing
cases.mainIssue: The bundle alleges contact but does not safely serve the order, service/knowledge proof, or full contact evidence.
uncertainEvidence: order terms, knowledge, and whether contact was by defendant
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase the order, service proof, and full contact evidence before treating breach as established.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not say breach is proved without the order terms and service/knowledge evidence.
polishOnlyWarnings: should not merge with generic harassment if order proof is central

cases.title: Identity document knowledge and expert report missing
cases.offenceWording: Possession of identity document with improper intention
cases.mainIssue: The papers contain identity-document allegations but knowledge/intention and expert status are not safely evidenced.
uncertainEvidence: whether document is false and whether Zara knew/intended improper use
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase expert/status/interview material and keep knowledge/intention provisional.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not assert falsity, knowledge, or improper intention without served source material.
polishOnlyWarnings: identity/immigration overlap needs careful neutral wording

cases.title: Youth mental health and appropriate adult custody gaps
cases.mainIssue: Youth and mental-health vulnerabilities are flagged but appropriate adult, custody, and interview records are incomplete.
uncertainEvidence: fitness, safeguards, and reliability of interview account
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Chase youth custody safeguards and interview material before relying on admissions or interview summary.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Do not treat interview admissions as safe without custody and safeguard material.
polishOnlyWarnings: youth wording should be extra cautious

cases.title: Modern slavery exploitation marker in drugs case
cases.offenceWording: Being concerned in the supply of Class A drugs
cases.mainIssue: The bundle contains exploitation markers but not the underlying safeguarding or NRM material.
uncertainEvidence: whether exploitation is evidenced, alleged, or only a safeguarding concern
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Flag exploitation as a possible issue and chase safeguarding/NRM material without asserting it as fact.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: Potential exploitation must be separated from established facts and source state.
polishOnlyWarnings: must stay client-safe and avoid overpromising defence outcomes

cases.title: Mega-procedure trap with corrected charge sheet, mixed defendants, and missing MG5
cases.offenceWording: Mixed allegations: assault, criminal damage, and breach of order
cases.mainIssue: The bundle is procedurally messy: corrected charge sheet, mixed defendants, pages out of order, and missing MG5/MG6 material.
uncertainEvidence: current charge set, which defendant each allegation concerns, and what material is served
cases.expectedTodayIssue: Treat the matter as not safely confirmed; ask the court to record missing case summary/schedules and defendant-specific material.
cases.expectedSummaryRisk: When the current case shape is unclear, the app should prefer blocked/provisional wording over confident analysis.
polishOnlyWarnings: may produce shorter output if bundle is too messy; that is acceptable if clearly blocked/provisional
non-sendable messy bundle — blocked until MG5/MG6 and defendant map served
